generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor collecting raw point cloud data for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARRawPointCloudData
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera capturing depth information for obstacle detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraDepthData
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring vehicle speed for ego vehicle state data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedData
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring steering angle for ego vehicle state data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleData
]

instance LiDARRawPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthCameraDepthData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance LiDARRawData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARRawPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance DepthCameraRawData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw depth data from Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraDepthData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance VehicleSpeedRawData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw speed data from vehicle speed sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance SteeringAngleRawData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw steering angle data from steering angle sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance PointCloudClusteredData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Clustering of LiDAR point cloud data using DBSCAN algorithm"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARRawPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo NVIDIAJetpack50
]

instance ObjectTrackingData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object tracks generated from Kalman filter processing"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARRawPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo NVIDIAJetpack50
]

instance ACCInputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Combined data for ACC computation including object tracks and vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARRawPointCloudData, VehicleSpeedData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Cpp
]

instance SerializedLiDARData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Serialized LiDAR data after protocol conversion"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARRawPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2
]

instance SerializedDepthData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Serialized depth data after protocol conversion"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraDepthData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2
]

instance SerializedVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Serialized ego vehicle state data after unit conversions"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedData, SteeringAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2
]

instance PersistentVehicleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Persistent vehicle data stored in SQL database for historical analysis"
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for data serialization, protocol conversion, and unit conversions"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ROS2 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 middleware for inter-process communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration of point cloud processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for high-level application modules and user interface"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Cpp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for low-latency data processing and control logic"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance PointCloudClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for clustering LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo NVIDIAJetpack50
]

instance ObjectTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking based on clustered point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo NVIDIAJetpack50
]

instance ACCModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control model for speed computation based on distance to lead vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Cpp
]

instance ActuationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Converts ACC speed commands into motor voltage and steering angle commands"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "User interface displaying real-time vehicle state data, projected driving paths, and detected object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVehicleStateInsight, ProjectedDrivingPathInsight, DetectedObjectTracksInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloading ACC system (lead vehicle detection, speed calculation) from on-board ECUs to cloud resources"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCSpeedCalculationInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote enable/disable ACC, set desired speeds, and emergency braking commands"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableDisableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingCommand
]

instance RealTimeVehicleStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time display of vehicle speed, steering angle, and other state data"
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPathInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of projected vehicle path based on current trajectory"
]

instance DetectedObjectTracksInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Tracking of detected objects in the vehicle's environment"
]

instance ACCSpeedCalculationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Computed speed for ACC based on lead vehicle detection"
]

instance EnableDisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command to enable or disable Adaptive Cruise Control system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command to set desired speed for ACC"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingCommand : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Emergency braking command issued remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for motor control based on ACC commands"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo for steering adjustments based on ACC commands"
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationUI : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D visualization component for real-time data display"
]

instance ControlPanelUI : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control panel for remote management commands"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, VedderElectronicSpeedController, SteeringServo
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains DataTranslationEnabler, ROS2, NVIDIAJetpack50, Python38, Cpp, PointCloudClusteringModel, ObjectTrackingModel, ACCModel, ActuationEnabler
]

instance UserEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains ThreeDVisualizationUI, ControlPanelUI, DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands from the ACC Controlling FE and Control Panel User Interface FE are serialized by the Data Translation component and transmitted over Wi-Fi using UDP to the Actuation FE for motor and steering servo actuation."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for coordination between devices to enable computation offloading in safety-critical vehicular applications, constrained by hardware limitations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture follows ISO 23247 Reference Architecture (RA) with modifications, mapping software components to Functional Entities (FEs) implemented as ROS2 packages. The system is structured into three entities: Physical Twin Entity (hosting resource-specific and general automotive functionality), Digital Twin Entity (data management and control), and User Entity (3D Visualization and Control Panel). Each entity is deployed on separate hardware, with the Physical Twin Entity representing a significant deviation from the standard's OME."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity requirements emphasize real-time and high-fidelity computational reflections as stated in the Introduction. Validation includes Requirement R7 enforcing network latency of at most 100 ms and Requirement R8 ensuring clock synchronization accuracy within 100 ms. These constraints ensure system responsiveness and temporal consistency for accurate Digital Twin operations."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Internal communication between software components uses ROS2, while inter-entity communication occurs over Wi-Fi with UDP transport. The system adheres to Requirement R7, maintaining network latency of at most 100 ms. The architecture employs a distributed network topology with ROS2 for intra-entity and Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication, ensuring reliable data exchange within specified latency constraints."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Each entity (Physical Twin, Digital Twin, User Entity) is deployed on dedicated hardware components. Specific hardware includes NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano for edge processing of sensor data. Compute resources are allocated to cloud or edge based on suitability, as per Section III.A. The deployment model supports both edge and cloud environments, with NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano handling real-time tasks and cloud resources providing scalability for data storage and processing."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247:2021 standard, which includes four parts: Part 1 (Overview and general principles), Part 2 (Reference architecture), Part 3 (Digital representation of physical manufacturing elements), and Part 4 (Information exchange). Part 2 defines an entity-based reference architecture comprising Observable Manufacturing Elements (OMEs) as physical entities (e.g., equipment, facilities, products), Data Collection and Device Control Entity for data collection and control, Digital Twin Entity for digital representation, and User Entity for user interaction interfaces. Each entity is composed of Functional Entities (FEs) handling tasks such as actuation, data transformation, and user interfacing."
]
